JPS Badminton
Court

Professional Indoor Badminton Experience

JPS Badminton Court, run by Rajan Sharma, provides high-quality indoor badminton facilities for players of all levels. The court offers a professional playing environment, quality equipment, and a friendly sports community. Many players from this court have even traveled internationally to compete in tournaments.

About Us

Where Champions
Are Made

JPS Badminton Court is proudly run by Rajan Sharma, a passionate sports enthusiast dedicated to building a world-class badminton facility right here in Najibabad. With two full-size professional indoor courts, the facility offers an ideal environment for players at every level.

Whether you are a beginner discovering the sport or an experienced player sharpening your competitive edge, JPS Badminton Court is your home. Players train and practice regularly under a disciplined yet friendly atmosphere, building skills that have taken them all the way to international competitions.

Managed by Rajan Sharma
Two Full Indoor Courts
Rackets & Shuttlecocks Provided
Regular Training Sessions
Open for Boys & Girls
All Skill Levels Welcome

What We Offer

World-Class Facilities

🏸

Two Indoor Courts

Two regulation-size indoor badminton courts fully marked and net-equipped for competitive play.

⚡

Professional Flooring

High-quality sports flooring designed for optimal traction, performance, and player safety.

🎯

Equipment Available

Quality badminton rackets and shuttlecocks available, so you can play without bringing your own gear.

📋

Training & Practice

Structured training and practice sessions designed to improve technique, fitness, and match skills.

🤝

Friendly Environment

A welcoming, supportive sports community where every player is encouraged to grow and excel.

🏆

Tournament Exposure

Competitive opportunities including local tournaments and inter-state championship participation.

Tournaments & Honours

Our Achievements

2

Indoor Courts

🇳🇵

Nepal Tournament

200+

Active Members

🥇

Multiple Trophies

JPS Badminton Court has cultivated some of the finest badminton talent in the region. Our players have participated in numerous local, city-level, and state-level tournaments, consistently bringing home medals and recognition.

In a landmark achievement, players from JPS Badminton Court traveled to Nepal to compete in the prestigious Indo-Nepal Youth Games Championship 2025 — an international tournament organized by the Youth Games Education Federation of India and recognized by the Ministry of MSME and Fit India Movement.

The court banner proudly declares: "All Winners From J.P.S. Court Najibabad" — a testament to the quality of training and the dedication of every player who trains here.

Indo-Nepal Youth Games Championship 2025 — Multiple Winners from JPS Court!
Winner — Open Badminton Tournament 2026 🏸

The People Behind JPS

Meet Our Leadership

⭐ Founder

Rajan Sharma

Founder & Director

The visionary behind JPS Badminton Court, Rajan Sharma built this facility from the ground up with a passion for promoting badminton in Najibabad. His dedication has helped hundreds of players discover and excel in the sport.

🏸 Court Manager 📞 8791258100
🌟 Co-Founder

Aadi Sharma

Co-Founder

Co-Founder of JPS Badminton Court, Aadi Sharma brings energy and fresh ideas to the facility. A young sports enthusiast committed to growing the JPS community and inspiring the next generation of badminton champions.

JPS Badminton Court

Located in the heart of Najibabad at Himalyan Colony, Kotwali Road. Our facility is easily accessible and welcomes players from across the city and beyond. Come visit us to see the courts in person and meet our community of players!
